## HKCU

| 路径 | Hive | 主题 | 状态 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKU\<SID>\Software\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">当前用户使用 Microsoft Remote Desktop Client / mstsc.exe 时产生的客户端侧目标历史。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">用户行为</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client](hkcu/software/microsoft/terminal-server-client.md) | [RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\MountPoints2</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKU\<SID>\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\MountPoints2</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">当前用户 Shell 见过的卷、盘符、可移动介质或网络共享位置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">用户行为</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\MountPoints2](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/mountpoints2.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\RecentDocs</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Explorer 维护的最近文档名称、扩展名分组和 MRU 顺序。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">用户行为</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\RecentDocs](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/recentdocs.md) | [Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\RunMRU</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Win+R Run dialog 的输入历史。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">用户行为</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">程序执行</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\RunMRU](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/runmru.md) | [Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\UserAssist\{GUID}\Count</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKU\<SID>\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\UserAssist\{GUID}\Count</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Explorer 维护的用户交互记录，可辅助观察用户通过 Shell 触发过的程序线索。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">用户行为</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">程序执行</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\UserAssist](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/userassist.md) | [程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">用户级登录启动项，只作用于对应用户 SID 的登录会话。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |

## HKLM

| 路径 | Hive | 主题 | 状态 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">机器级组件定义和每用户初始化命令配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">软件</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components](hklm/software/microsoft/active-setup.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[软件安装与卸载](../questions/software-install.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">按可执行文件名生效的进程启动、调试和诊断配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">程序执行</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/ifeo.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[反取证与清理痕迹](../questions/anti-forensics.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\NetworkList\Profiles</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Windows 识别过的网络配置文件、网络名称、类别和连接时间相关字段。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\NetworkList\Profiles](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/networklist/profiles.md) | [网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">SID 到用户 profile 目录的机器级映射。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/profilelist.md) | [账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">交互式登录流程、Shell、Userinit、自动登录和部分 Winlogon 扩展配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon /v CachedLogonsCount</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">控制系统可缓存的域登录凭据数量。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\CachedLogonsCount](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon/cachedlogonscount.md) | [账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\UserList</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">控制部分本地账户是否显示在登录界面用户列表中。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\UserList](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon/specialaccounts-userlist.md) | [账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">UAC、管理员审批模式、登录提示和部分系统安全策略。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System](hklm/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/policies/system.md) | [安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">机器级登录启动项，适用于所有用户登录后的自动启动命令。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hklm/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Microsoft Defender Antivirus 的策略配置位置之一。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">软件</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender](hklm/software/policies/microsoft/windows-defender.md) | [安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[反取证与清理痕迹](../questions/anti-forensics.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\WindowsFirewall</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Windows Firewall / Windows Defender Firewall 的策略配置位置之一。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\WindowsFirewall](hklm/software/policies/microsoft/windowsfirewall.md) | [安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[反取证与清理痕迹](../questions/anti-forensics.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet001</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">SYSTEM hive 中保存系统控制配置的真实控制集。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md) | [常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md)<br>[自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\DeviceClasses</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\DeviceClasses</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">设备接口类和接口实例的注册信息。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\DeviceClasses](hklm/system/controlset/control/deviceclasses.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa /v Security Packages</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\Lsa /v Security Packages</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">LSA 可使用的安全支持包列表配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\Lsa\Security Packages](hklm/system/controlset/control/lsa/security-packages.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">RDP-Tcp listener 的服务端配置，包括端口、NLA、安全层和连接限制。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp](hklm/system/controlset/control/terminal-server/rdp-tcp.md) | [RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md)<br>[安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\SWD\WPDBUSENUM</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\SWD\WPDBUSENUM</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Windows Portable Devices 相关设备枚举记录。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\SWD\WPDBUSENUM](hklm/system/controlset/enum/swd-wpdbusenum.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\USB</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USB</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">USB 总线层面枚举到的设备实例。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USB](hklm/system/controlset/enum/usb.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\USBSTOR</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">USB Mass Storage 设备枚举信息。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR](hklm/system/controlset/enum/usbstor.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">服务、驱动、网络组件和部分系统组件的配置入口。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\EventLog</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\EventLog</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Windows Event Log 服务下经典日志通道的注册表配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\EventLog](hklm/system/controlset/services/eventlog.md) | [安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[反取证与清理痕迹](../questions/anti-forensics.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\SharedAccess\Parameters\FirewallPolicy</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\SharedAccess\Parameters\FirewallPolicy</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">Windows Defender Firewall 本地 profile 和规则配置的一部分。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">策略</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\SharedAccess\Parameters\FirewallPolicy](hklm/system/controlset/services/sharedaccess/firewallpolicy.md) | [安全策略与防护配置](../questions/policy-security.md)<br>[网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">单个网络接口的 IP、DNS、DHCP、网关和租约配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces](hklm/system/controlset/services/tcpip/parameters/interfaces.md) | [网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">卷 GUID、DOS 盘符和设备标识之间的映射。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices](hklm/system/mounteddevices.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
